hooks.command: echo 'Session start — read MEMORY.md and SCRATCHPAD.md to restore context. Check BACKLOG.md only if user references prior findings.'

f="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/CLAUDE.md"; [ -f "$f" ] && [ $(wc -c < "$f") -gt 40000 ] && echo 'WARNING: CLAUDE.md exceeds 40000 chars — extract largest section to agent_docs/ per Documentation Rules.' || true

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git commit'; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && staged=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^(\.claude/|CLAUDE\.md|AGENTS\.md|agent_docs/|docs/wiki/)' || true); [ -n "$staged" ] && echo "GitNexus read-only guard: agent-config/doc files are staged — confirm these are intended (not GitNexus side-effects) before committing, else 'git restore --staged' / 'git checkout --':\n$staged"; fi; exit 0
